chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تُصَلِّي بِحِيَالِ الرَّجُلِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يُصَلِّي وَ الْمَرْأَةُ بِحِيَالِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 15 – The woman prays Salāt parallel with the man, and the man prays Salāt and the woman is parallel to him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/73)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/73)
text: كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) يُصَلِّي وَ عَائِشَةُ نَائِمَةٌ مُعْتَرِضَةٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَ هِيَ لَا تُصَلِّي .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Fazzal, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Bin Rabaat, from one of our companions,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Rasool-Allahsaww was praying Salāt, and Ayesha was sleeping sideways in front of himsaww, and she was not praying Salāt’.
en.sarwar: 6. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Faddal from Ali ibn al-Hassan ibn Ribat from certain persons of our people who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The Messenger of Allah would perform Salah (prayer) while ‘A’ishah slept sideways in front of him, while she did not perform Salah (prayer).”’
